description: A buyer client needs to schedule their home inspection within the contingency period.

nodes.task_description: Provide the buyer with a list of 3-4 trusted home inspectors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a list of approved vendors to the client.

nodes.task_description: Once the buyer chooses an inspector, coordinate a time for the inspection that works for the buyer, inspector, and sellers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds a mutually agreeable time.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the appointment with all parties and add it to the transaction calendar.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the inspection and updates the calendar.
